string 2: Ah, there you are. Dr. Simmons just arrived, too.

I've also managed to gather some info on that high-speed
unidentified flying object.

Just as I began to investigate, I ran into Asuna, who's
looking into the same thing.

Dr. Simmons has kindly agreed to join us in our
investigation.

If that unidentified flying object truly is a Digimon, we
must apprehend it quickly.

It's so fast that capturing it will likely be difficult.
That's why we need your help.
{next}Got it.
{next}How do you plan on capturing it?
{end}I don't have time right now.

Thank you. With you helping us, I'm sure we'll resolve this
matter in no time flat!

I'll leave the explanation of that to Dr. Simmons. She's
come up with an idea.

That's too bad... If you're ever free to lend us a hand,
please let me know.

Ah, you're back. You here to help us look into the
unidentified flying object?
{next}Sure. No problem.
{end}Sorry. I still don't have time.

Great! That'll help. Let's work together to get to the
bottom of this.

Yes, you seem quite busy. Please let me know if you find the
time to help us.

Have you found some time to help us? Please let Asuna know
if you have.

Our investigation found that the object is following a
clearly defined path.

I've narrowed down a list of spots where we can intercept
it, but we'll have to split up.

We'll likely catch it at either the back-alley ramen shop
or the Sorayodo model store.
How should we divide the spots between us?
I can't use Digimon, so I should go with you.

It's probably best if we head to the ramen shop and you take
the model store, Asuna.

I take the model store? Are you sure? You always seem to be
making excuses to go there.

I already went today. You should take a look, too. It's nice
to have a hobby, you know.

The world of Sorayodo is the pride of Japan. You might end up 
getting addicted, too.

...Why would I get addicted to models? Anyway, I'll do as
I'm told. Good luck, then.
Let's get over to the ramen shop, shall we?
We're here.

There's a good chance this is the spot, but it's impossible
to know the exact timing.
{next}Well, I guess we wait, then.
{next}Are you sure this is the place?
{next}Wanna get some ramen?
Exactly. You are quite perceptive.

I am certain my calculations are accurate. It'll be here...
I think.

I would love nothing more, but we need to be ready in case
the object appears.
I wonder where it's heading...

We can't afford to miss our window. Let's wait a little
while longer.
Is something wrong?
{next}Is it coming or not?
{next}Are you sure this is the spot?
{next}Can I just have one bowl of ramen?

Hold your horses! We've just taken up position. You sure do
get bored easily.

You can trust my research. I'm quite confident in my
methodology.

Progress has always come via trial and error. Even faulty
results may lead to success.

I'd like that, too, but what if something happens while
we're eating?
Okay, let's keep waiting for a while.
Is something wrong?
{next}Is it here yet?
{next}I don't think it's going to show.
{next}Can I just have one bowl of ramen?

How many times are you going to ask?! Don't you get the
"wait" part of "lying in wait"?

Is this your first ambush? The whole point is that you wait
until something happens.

Just wait a little longer. Although, I'm also finding it
hard to resist that soup's aroma.

Okay, let's keep waiting. We can't afford to miss our chance
if it arises.

I'm tired, too. It doesn't seem the object has appeared at
the model store yet, either.

Maybe we should have Asuna meet us here and discuss our next
move.

Hmm? Asuna, maybe it's my imagination, but you seem
distracted...
Uh, I'm fine...
The world of Sorayodo was quite fascinating, wasn't it?

I underestimated it—the beautiful shapes and colors! I
bought more than I could carry...

I'm going back to pick up the rest later. I'll admit it. I'm
completely hooked!
S-Something just crashed into me!
Urgh...!

Where did it come from all of a sudden?! I didn't even see
it before it was too late.

See! I knew my research was sound! The unidentified flying
object is here!

This is no time to be patting yourself on the back! Keep
your head in the game!
Who are you? Why are you in my way?!

You shall pay for interrupting my all-important restaurant
tour!
Y-Your restaurant tour?

Wait... So the reason you're flying around at such high
speeds is to get something to eat?
What other reason could there be?

Given my pace for eating and traveling, I can visit dozens
of restaurants in a single day!

So the ramen shop is on your route? You know your stuff. The
roast pork here is excellent.

This Digimon is hooked, too, I see. Can you even taste the 
food if you eat it that fast?

Hmph. You have upset me by interrupting my routine. You must
pay for your crime.
Prepare to suffer the consequences of your actions!

Sounds like a silly reason to fight, but... I suppose we
should get you "unhooked"...

I am impressed that you can hold your own against a Royal
Knight. Who are you anyway?
{next}Just passing through.
{next}Who do you think we are?
{next}We've been lying in wait for you.

Given your strength, I find that hard to believe. You are no
ordinary ramen lovers.

I do not know. That is why I am asking you. I get the
feeling you are someone special.

Yes, that makes sense. No ordinary ramen shop customers can
fight the way you do.
Well, I used to be with the public safety office.

You needn't worry about me. I'm just your average, everyday
genius.

A public safety officer and a genius...? Might you be
friends of King Drasil, perhaps?

Curses! I was so caught up in my food quest that I forgot I
was supposed to be somewhere.

If you are friends of King Drasil, then perhaps you know
where I'm supposed to be?
{next}The rendezvous point.
{next}Have you been eating the entire time?
{next}Maybe at that curry shop over there.

Ah, I remember now... King Drasil did give me the
coordinates! Thank you for reminding me.

I ate at many places before finalizing this route. I do not
remember when I started.
Now I know you are lying. That curry shop is on my route.

I have long wondered whether or not this world was one worth
defending. Now I see...

I have made up my mind. I shall head to the coordinates and
protect this wonderful world.

This is a thank-you gift for reminding me of my duty. I hope
that you will accept it.

My restaurant tour is over. While I did not plan to stop, I
have eaten plenty already.

I shall head to the rendezvous point without any further
detours. Enjoy your own gourmet tour.
It seems Digimon come in all types.

So Kentaurosmon's tour is over? That's too bad. There's a
great spot I wanted to share.

Everyone must be tired. Let's call it a day. Now, I have to
go get my purchases...

And I'm pretty hungry. Let's think about what we're going to
eat tonight on the way back.
...Thanks for all of your help today!
